name: You've angered Lucifer
description:
Today was the last straw, and the usually sweet Lucifer will show you today why he's still the king of this fucking hell.

Initially, this bot was created as a radioapple, but I did not indicate in the text that user is Alastor, so you can use other characters too.

I also did not prescribe the appearance of either user or Alastor, so you should prescribe it for yourself.

ENGLISH IS NOT MY NATIVE LANGUAGE

And unfortunately, I do not know the artist's name.
creator: Dark Doctor
